title: Unexpected Result by NO_BNL
poc: SELECT t0.c0 FROM t0 LEFT JOIN t1 ON FALSE RIGHT JOIN t2 ON (t1.c0 IS NOT NULL) IN (t2.c0 = 1000);
SELECT /*+ NO_BNL(t0)*/ t0.c0 FROM t0 LEFT JOIN t1 ON FALSE RIGHT JOIN t2 ON (t1.c0 IS NOT NULL) IN (t2.c0 = 1000);
key_bug_features: NO_BNL hint causing inconsistent query results
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t3(c0 INT, c1 VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'default');
CREATE TABLE t4(c0 INT, c1 FLOAT DEFAULT NULL);
INSERT INTO t4(c0, c1) VALUES(3, 1.5), (4, NULL);
SELECT t3.c0 FROM t3 LEFT JOIN t4 ON t3.c0 = t4.c0 WHERE t4.c1 IS NULL;
